name: Play Dough #4
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, salt, cream of tartar, water, and oil in a large pot.
2. Mix all the ingredients together until well combined.
3. Place the pot over low heat and stir gently.
4. Cook the mixture over low heat, stirring continuously, until it thickens and comes away from the sides of the pan, forming a dough-like consistency.
5. Remove the pot from the heat and let the play dough cool slightly.
6. Knead the play dough with your hands to ensure even distribution of ingredients and remove any lumps.
7. Add food coloring as desired and knead until you achieve the desired color.
